text: & S3 Object Lock @ wosiancancin - © s ¢ Object Lock enabled on ‘new’ buckets* (Support req for existing) ¢ Write-Once-Read-Many (WORM) - No Delete, No Overwrite * Requires versioning - individual versions are locked ¢ 1 - Retention Period e 2 - Legal Hold ¢ Both, One or the other, or none » A Bucket can have default Object Lock Settings
